algorithm: blocks of a uniformly random set partition of [n]
certificate: exact expected #blocks over all Bell(n) partitions: n=2: E[blocks]=1.500 (n/ln n=2.885); n=3: E[blocks]=2.000 (n/ln n=2.731); n=4: E[blocks]=2.467 (n/ln n=2.885); n=5: E[blocks]=2.904 (n/ln n=3.107); n=6: E[blocks]=3.320 (n/ln n=3.349); n=7: E[blocks]=3.721 (n/ln n=3.597); n=8: E[blocks]=4.108 (n/ln n=3.847); n=9: E[blocks]=4.484 (n/ln n=4.096)
